reasoning: A +1% increase to Abdusattorov's November 2025 rating of 2750 means he would need to reach 2777.5 Elo (effectively 2778) on the official FIDE lists. FIDE publishes updates monthly. By Nov 30, the Wikipedia page will still reflect the Nov 1 FIDE list, guaranteeing his rating on the page will remain 2750. By Dec 23, the Dec 1 list will be published. Gaining 28 classical Elo points in a single month at the super-GM level requires practically winning an elite tournament flawlessly, which very rarely happens. By Feb 21, 2026, events like Tata Steel will have concluded, giving him better opportunity to recover points he seemingly lost over the late summer (Sinquefield Cup). However, since 2778 would make him roughly World #4, an achievement of this rating within a 3-month timeframe still has a very low base rate, though uncertainty mechanically increases over time.
